description: May and Elena, alerted to the Chronicom threat, sneak into Area 51 using May's experience as a pilot. The two women coordinate their approach to identify the infiltrator, with Yo-Yo reminding May to keep her aggression in check given the presence of civilian scientists. However, as they attempt to confront the Chronicom, May suffers a panic attack, overwhelming her, while Elena is also unable to use her speed—both struggling with their own limitations as the Chronicom slips away.

transcript.line: So, after everything we've seen, no one blinks twice at a woman pilot?
Women pilots in the ‘40s and '50s out-flew the men. They had to, since we were towing the targets for target practice.
So, I know you're eager to be in the field. But these are civilian scientists, so...
If they don't react to this, they're the target.
I should have known something was fishy when everyone was saying how nice this Sharpe guy was. I always heard he was a jerk of the highest order.
And the lady pretending to be Carter? Worst fake accent you've ever heard.
Uh, stand back. They may get jumpy. Here they are. Hope it was worth the drive. Let's go.
I'm gonna need some time with them. Alone.
With all due respect to your department, not a chance. Look, either do this with me or not at all.
